title: Payment Gateway Timeout Surge
description: Payment requests timing out, causing a surge in 504 Gateway Timeouts and failed checkouts.
root_cause: A recent deployment of the payment-service introduced an unoptimized query to database-primary, locking rows and causing downstream timeouts.
resolution: Rolled back the payment-service deployment to the previous stable version. Applied a hotfix with optimized indices.

title: Order Creation Failures due to Inventory Sync
description: Users unable to complete checkout; order-service returning 500 Internal Server Error.
root_cause: The inventory-service cache in cache-cluster was evicted, causing a thundering herd on database-primary which exhausted connection pools.
resolution: Temporarily increased database connection limits. Scaled out cache-cluster and pre-warmed inventory cache before restoring normal traffic.

title: Authentication Token Validation Latency
description: API Gateway rejecting valid tokens occasionally; high p99 latency on auth-service.
root_cause: Expired SSL certificate on an internal Redis node in cache-cluster used for token validation.
resolution: Rotated SSL certificates on cache-cluster nodes and restarted auth-service pods to force new connections.

title: Stale Inventory Data Displayed on Frontend
description: Customers seeing items in stock that are actually sold out.
root_cause: A background cron job responsible for syncing inventory-service state to database-primary failed silently due to a schema change.
resolution: Fixed the cron job to handle the new schema and ran a manual backfill script to correct discrepancies.

title: Database Primary High CPU Utilization
description: database-primary CPU pegged at 100%, causing cascading latency across all tier-1 services.
root_cause: A rogue analytics query from billing-service hit the primary instead of a read replica.
resolution: Killed the rogue query. Updated billing-service connection string to strictly use read replicas for analytics.

title: Notification Service Dead Letter Queue Overflow
description: Email and SMS notifications delayed by up to 2 hours.
root_cause: Third-party email provider API rate limits exceeded, causing messages to pile up in DLQ.
resolution: Configured exponential backoff for retries. Manually flushed DLQ at a lower concurrency rate.

title: API Gateway SSL Termination Failure
description: All external traffic failing with SSL handshake errors.
root_cause: Automated cert rotation script failed due to an expired API key for the DNS provider.
resolution: Updated the API key and manually triggered the cert rotation script. Verified new certs.

title: Billing Service Double Charging Issue
description: Some users reported being charged twice for subscriptions.
root_cause: A retry mechanism in billing-service lacked idempotency keys when communicating with payment-service.
resolution: Halted billing cron jobs. Applied a hotfix adding idempotency keys to all payment requests. Issued automated refunds.

title: Auth Service Memory Leak
description: Auth service pods repeatedly OOMKilled, causing intermittent login failures.
root_cause: A new dependency added in the latest release was holding references to request context objects indefinitely.
resolution: Rolled back the auth-service deployment. Re-deployed with a patch fixing the memory leak.

title: Redis Cache Cluster Partition
description: High error rate fetching session data; auth and inventory services impacted.
root_cause: Network partition between two availability zones caused a split-brain scenario in cache-cluster.
resolution: Forced a cluster reconfiguration and elected a new leader. Restarted affected client connections.

title: Payment Processing Latency Spike
description: Payment processing taking >10s (normally <1s), no timeouts but poor user experience.
root_cause: Third-party payment gateway experiencing internal delays. payment-service didn't have a fast-fail circuit breaker.
resolution: Enabled circuit breaker via dynamic configuration to fail fast and route to a fallback payment processor.

title: Order Service Message Queue Backlog
description: Order processing delayed; messages piling up in Kafka.
root_cause: A bad configuration change reduced the number of consumer threads for order-service.
resolution: Reverted the config change to restore the original consumer thread pool size.
